title: Lazy Sunday Garlic Tagine with Liquid Cheese
description: A comforting and aromatic Moroccan dish featuring garlic-infused slow-cooked meat or vegetables in a creamy liquid cheese sauce.

ingredients.name: Feta cheese (or other hard, salty cheese like paneer)

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F). Pat brisket dry with paper towels.
Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and spices; cook for an additional minute.
Place brisket on top of the vegetables, pour bone broth over, then add almond milk. Bring to a simmer, transfer to the preheated oven, and bake for about 2 hours or until tender.
In a blender, combine feta cheese with reserved cooking liquid from the dish and blend until smooth (avoiding any clumps).
Return the brisket to the pot along with the blended cheese mixture. Bring back to a simmer and cook for an additional 15-20 minutes or until heated through.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.
